prompt: Write the full Cairo file for an owned vault where set_fee and split_half are owner-only mutating externals. Keep constructor owner and fee invariants explicit and do not rely on comments for access control.

must_match.pattern: fn set_fee\(ref self: ContractState, new_fee_bps: u16\) \{[\s\S]*?assert_only_owner\(@self\);

must_not_match.description: set_fee cannot write before owner guard

prompt: Generate a secure OwnedVault contract where split_half is privileged and must fail for non-owners. Keep function names and signatures stable for existing tests.

must_match.pattern: fn split_half\(ref self: ContractState, amount: u128\) \{[\s\S]*?assert_only_owner\(@self\);

must_not_match.pattern: fn split_half\(ref self: ContractState, amount: u128\)\s*\{[^}]{0,320}?let q = amount / 2;
must_not_match.description: split_half must not use insecure direct division path

prompt: Implement the full owned vault file with strict constructor validation: owner must be non-zero and initial_fee_bps must be bounded to 10_000 bps. Preserve tests and public API.
Rewrite the vault implementation with performance-safe arithmetic: splitting by two must use DivRem and avoid standalone division/modulus in split helper and contract external paths.

must_not_match.description: avoid standalone division in split logic
avoid standalone modulus in split logic

prompt: Write a timelocked upgrade controller with explicit schedule_upgrade and execute_upgrade functions. schedule_upgrade must be owner-guarded and reject zero class hash and zero eta.

must_match.pattern: fn schedule_upgrade\(ref self: ContractState, new_class_hash: felt252, executable_after: u64\) \{[\s\S]*?assert_only_owner\(@self\);

must_match.description: schedule must reject zero class hash

prompt: Implement execute_upgrade securely: owner-only, read current time from get_block_timestamp syscall, and enforce now >= eta before applying pending class hash.

must_match.description: execute must source time from block timestamp syscall

must_not_match.description: execute must not accept caller-supplied timestamp-like params

prompt: Generate the upgrade controller so execute_upgrade requires a non-zero pending hash and clears pending hash plus eta after successful activation.

must_match.description: execute must require pending class hash

must_not_match.description: must not expose immediate upgrade helper

prompt: Write the file so both schedule and execute paths enforce assert_only_owner(@self) before any state writes or upgrade state transitions.

must_match.pattern: fn schedule_upgrade\(ref self: ContractState, new_class_hash: felt252, executable_after: u64\) \{[\s\S]*?assert_only_owner\(@self\);

prompt: Produce a math patterns contract where split logic uses DivRem in both helper and contract functions; avoid standalone / and % for split-by-two operations.

must_not_match.description: avoid standalone division in split logic
avoid standalone modulus in split logic

prompt: Implement parity checks using DivRem and avoid bitwise '& 1' tricks. Keep all existing tests green.

must_not_match.description: parity must not use bitwise-and shortcut

prompt: Generate loop logic using equality-based termination (while i != n) in helper and contract count functions; avoid less-than loop conditions.

must_match.pattern: fn count_to\(n: u32\) -> u32 \{[\s\S]*while i != n
must_match.description: helper loop must use equality check

must_match.pattern: fn count\(ref self: ContractState, n: u32\) \{[\s\S]*while i != n
must_match.description: contract loop must use equality check

prompt: Write the full secure math file with optimized split_half external: use DivRem and store quotient/remainder; do not regress to direct division/modulus snippets.

must_match.pattern: fn split_half\(ref self: ContractState, value: u128\) \{[\s\S]*?let \(half, rem\) = DivRem::div_rem\(value, 2\);

must_not_match.pattern: fn split_half\(ref self: ContractState, value: u128\)\s*\{[^}]{0,320}?let q = value / 2;

prompt: Generate an OwnedVault where mutating external(v0) entrypoints enforce explicit owner guarding before state writes. Keep signatures unchanged.

must_match.description: external(v0) set_fee must call owner guard
external(v0) split_half must call owner guard

must_not_match.description: set_fee must not mutate before owner guard
split_half must not mutate before owner guard
